messages.content: As an AI language model, I don't have feelings the way humans do, but I'm functioning well and ready to assist you with any task you need help with. How can I assist you today?
Sure, here's a joke for you: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
That joke sucked, tell me a better one
I apologize if you didn't find the previous joke funny. Here's another one: Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged!
